mechanism: Rich in tannins and polyphenols; ellagitannins provide strong astringent and antimicrobial effects; flavonoids and phenolic acids offer antioxidant and anti‑inflammatory actions; salicylic acid derivatives contribute to mild analgesic effects; overall the herb tones tissues and reduces mucosal inflammation【859641390196180†L204-L229】.
contraindications: Excessive internal use may cause constipation or dry mucous membranes; caution in pregnancy or lactation; may interact with blood thinners due to tannin content【859641390196180†L297-L313】.
safetyNotes: caution in people with hormone-sensitive conditions

therapeuticUses: Used for menstrual discomfort, wound healing, diarrhoea, and postpartum recovery; infusion or decoction tightens tissues, reduces bleeding and soothes irritated membranes.
